'''kayozo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cabezon|cabezon]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-y-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cabezon|cabezon]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| kayozo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæyezeth|kæyezeth]] || [[word:kæyezej|kæyezej]] || [[word:kæyezesh|kæyezesh]] || [[word:kæyeze|kæyeze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kayoyozoth|kayoyozoth]] || [[word:kayoyozoj|kayoyozoj]] || [[word:kayoyozosh|kayoyozosh]] || [[word:kayoyozo|kayoyozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kayozoth|kayozoth]] || [[word:kayozoj|kayozoj]] || [[word:kayozosh|kayozosh]] || [[word:kayozo|kayozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kayofzoth|kayofzoth]] || [[word:kayofzoj|kayofzoj]] || [[word:kayofzosh|kayofzosh]] || [[word:kayofzof|kayofzof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kayozotho|kayozotho]] || [[word:kayozojo|kayozojo]] || [[word:kayozosho|kayozosho]] || [[word:kayozoko|kayozoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kayozoth|kayozoth]] || [[word:kayozoj|kayozoj]] || [[word:kayozosh|kayozosh]] || [[word:kayozo|kayozo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kayozothol|kayozothol]] || [[word:kayozojol|kayozojol]] || [[word:kayozoshol|kayozoshol]] || [[word:kayozokol|kayozokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kayozothotho|kayozothotho]] || [[word:kayozojojo|kayozojojo]] || [[word:kayozoshosho|kayozoshosho]] || [[word:kayozoko|kayozoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kayozothon|kayozothon]] || [[word:kayozojon|kayozojon]] || [[word:kayozoshon|kayozoshon]] || [[word:kayozokon|kayozokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kayozothoro|kayozothoro]] || [[word:kayozojoro|kayozojoro]] || [[word:kayozoshoro|kayozoshoro]] || [[word:kayozokoro|kayozokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
